name: Green Chile Enchilada Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 to 3/4 cup ground red chili powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: Saute the onions until soft with all spices and green chilies.
2. Add juice, and simmer for 15 minutes. Blend until smooth.
3. When cooling in the refrigerator, do not cover.
4. Substitute 8 to 12 Jalapeno peppers (with tops cut off and seeds removed) for the green chili.
5. Substitute 1/4 to 3/4 cup ground red chili powder for the green chili.
